title: Koewarasan Heat Wave
lead: Koewarasan is experiencing a severe heat wave with a Z-Score of +3.57. This extreme weather event has reached a critical level with a score of 10.0/10.
body:
The current heat wave in Koewarasan has resulted in extremely high temperatures, with a Cooling Degree Days (CDD) value of 11.5 GG. 
 The relative humidity is at 68%, and the wind speed is 11.3 km/h, exacerbating the heat. 
 The city's infrastructure and residents are under significant stress due to this extreme weather condition.
conclusion: Implement emergency heat wave response protocols immediately.
